q: My friend is sympathetic as well as understanding.
a: My friend is both sympathetic and understanding.

q: Mon Mon studies very hard and so does Yamin.
a: Both Mon Mon and Yamin study very hard.

q: Yan Aung bought a new car and so did Dwe.
a: Both Yan Aung and Dwe bought new cars.

q: The fatherless child was dirty as well as ragged.
a: The fatherless child was both dirty and ragged.

q: My brother has never been to Kalaw. My mother has never been to Kalaw.
a: Both my brother and mother have never been to Kalaw.

q: Ngapali is a beautiful beach. Ngwe Saung is a beautiful beach.
a: Both Ngapali and Ngwe Saung are beautiful beaches.

q: Mother has never been to Bagan. Ko Ko has never been to Bagan.
a: Both mother and Ko Ko have never been to Bagan.

q: Not only Myat Myat but also Latt Latt is expert at using the computer.
a: Both Myat Myat and Latt Latt are expert at using the computer.

q: The philosopher came back empty-handed. So did the medico.
a: Both the philosopher and the medico came back empty-handed.

q: U San Thein is a good-natured doctor and so is U Kyaw Swar.
a: Both U San Thein and U Kyaw Swar are good-natured doctors.

q: Ko Ko does not study hard and neither does Nyi Nyi.
a: Both Ko Ko and Nyi Nyi do not study hard.

q: Soe Soe likes Korean films and so does Toe Toe.
a: Both Soe Soe and Toe Toe like Korean films.

q: Not only my mother but also my sister likes coffee.
a: Both my mother and my sister like coffee.

q: U Than Toe and Daw Mya Sein are good-natured doctors.
a: Both U Than Toe and Daw Mya Sein are good-natured doctors.

q: The boy has drawn a picture. The girl has drawn a picture.
a: Both the boy and the girl have drawn pictures.

q: Tin Tin Mya is a famous vocalist. Cho Pyone is a famous vocalist.
a: Both Tin Tin Mya and Cho Pyone are famous vocalists.

q: Not only Thida but also Yi Mon have gone to the party.
a: Both Thida and Yi Mon have gone to the party.

q: Neither Ko Ko nor Nyi Nyi watched TV last night.
a: Both Ko Ko and Nyi Nyi did not watch TV last night.

q: Ma Pwint is sweet and nice and so is her sister.
a: Both Ma Pwint and her sister are sweet and nice.

q: Not only the worm but also the snail does not have a backbone.
a: Both the worm and the snail do not have backbones.

q: Not only Thuzar but also Yupar is a hard working student.
a: Both Thuzar and Yupar are hardworking students.

q: The computer makes our life convenient. The telephone also makes our life convenient.
a: Both the computer and the telephone make our life convenient.

q: Not only Zaw Zaw but also Moe Moe attends her classes regularly.
a: Both Zaw Zaw and Moe Moe attend their classes regularly.

q: "Robinson Crusoe" is an adventure story. "Jungle Book" is an adventure story, too.
a: Both "Robinson Crusoe" and "Jungle Book" are adeventure stories.

q: She is fluent in Spanish as well as Portuguese, which helps her communicate easily during international conferences.
a: She is fluent in both Spanish and Portuguese, which helps her communicate easily during international conferences.

q: Not only did he complete the project ahead of schedule, but he also presented it with impressive confidence.
a: He both completed the project ahead of schedule and presented it with impressive confidence.

q: Neither my brother nor I have ever traveled abroad due to financial constraints.
a: Both my brother and I have never traveled abroad due to financial constraints.

q: The university offers business management courses as well as advanced language programs for international students.
a: The university offers both business management courses and advanced language programs for international students.

q: They had finished the report before the deadline, and so had our research team.
a: Both they and our research team had finished the report before the deadline.

q: Not only were they late for the meeting, but they also forgot to bring the important documents.
a: They were both late for the meeting and forgot to bring the important documents.

q: The proposal was neither realistic nor financially feasible.
a: The proposal was both unrealistic and financially unfeasible.

q: I'm going to attend the seminar in the morning, and so is my colleague from the finance department.
a: Both my colleague from the finance department and I are going to attend the seminar in the morning.

q: He not only apologized during the meeting but also sent a formal letter of apology later.
a: He both apologized during the meeting and sent a formal letter of apology later.

q: The company needs to reduce production costs as well as to improve customer satisfaction rates.
a: The company needs both to reduce production costs and to improve customer satisfaction rates.

q: She organized the conference herself, and she also designed all the promotional materials.
a: She both organized the conference and designed all the promotional materials herself.

q: The book is informative as well as beautifully illustrated with charts and images.
a: The book is both informative and beautifully illustrated with charts and images.

q: The new policy affects students from rural areas, and it also affects teachers working in remote schools.
a: The new policy affects both students from rural areas and teachers working in remote schools.

q: We were impressed by the quality of the presentation, and so were our international partners.
a: Both we and our international partners were impressed by the quality of the presentation.

q: Neither the headmaster nor the students were aware of the inspection that happened yesterday.
a: Both the headmaster and the students were unaware of the inspection that happened yesterday.

q: She is unconfident in public speaking, and she is also inexperienced in team management.
a: She is both unconfident in public speaking and inexperienced in team management.

q: Not only did the manager praise the employees, but he also announced a performance bonus.
a: The manager both praised the employees and announced a performance bonus.

q: He brought snacks for everyone, and he also brought drinks for the people who had been working late.
a: He brought both snacks for everyone and drinks for the people who had been working late.
